title: Which Companies Are Hiring Product Designers Right Now? (Live ATS Data)
description: 11 companies, 43 live product design roles (fetched 2026-07-12) - biggest hirers, 47% remote share, full table.
answer_first: Live careers-board data fetched July 12, 2026 shows 11 companies currently advertising 43 product design positions. Stripe tops the table with 10 open roles, and 20 of 43 listings (47%) allow remote work. First capture: 2026-07-12. The initial baseline records 43 live openings to compare future refreshes against. Scroll down for the full role-by-role table: company, title, location, remote status, and posting date.

facts: The 2026-07-12 scrape counted 43 current product design openings spanning 11 distinct companies.
Stripe posts 10 of the roles, the most of any company, with Robinhood next at 6.
The remote share sits at 47%: 20 of 43 listings allow remote.
By location, Menlo Park, CA; New York, NY leads with 5 roles.
In the final 7 days before this fetch, 2 of the listed roles were posted.
Initial capture (2026-07-12) logs 43 openings as the comparison baseline.

faq.q: What is the source of these job listings?
faq.a: Each listing was read directly from a company's own public careers board via its ATS API on 2026-07-12. The query 'product design' matched 43 open roles across 11 companies, and posting dates are the employers' own.

faq.q: Which employer tops this hiring table?
faq.a: Stripe, with 10 open product design roles out of 43 total - ahead of Robinhood at 6. The lead is recomputed from board data at every refresh.

faq.q: Can these jobs be done remotely?
faq.a: Some can: 20 of 43 listings (47%) are marked remote by the employer. Check the Remote column for each specific role.
All rows come from a 2026-07-12 scrape; 2 of them were posted within the preceding 7 days. Because boards change daily, treat the table as a dated snapshot that this URL keeps refreshing.
